name: worldgen-site-distribution-v2
description: Measures overworld site distribution across worldgen runs with prompt cycling across 5 biomes. Warning-oriented — no strict thresholds yet.
prompt_cycle: I am standing in a dense forest.
I am standing in a vast desert.
I am standing in a murky swamp.
I am standing in a snowy tundra.
I am standing in a grassy plain.
